summary: Comprehensive testing of AIBrief24 data quality improvements: source_url population, image variety, deduplication, article count, categories filtering, search, and article detail. Backend: 22/24 passed (1 failed due to known proxy timeout, 1 skipped). Frontend: All 10 critical flows verified. All data quality fixes are confirmed working.

minor.issue: Returns 502 via public proxy (known issue - synchronous long-running endpoint times out at proxy). Works via internal localhost endpoint. Deduplication confirmed working via direct test: count stable at 288 before/after ingest run.

issues: Source name ('TechCrunch') is displayed as styled blue text BUT is NOT a tappable link to source_url. The API returns source_url (e.g. https://techcrunch.com) but it's not used as a clickable link in the article detail UI. Only article_url is used (via 'Read Full Article' button). Consider making source_name a tappable link to source_url.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: shadow* style props deprecated, use boxShadow (non-blocking)

article_count.note: Count grew from 261 to 288 due to ongoing ingestion runs adding genuinely new articles. Deduplication working correctly.

source_url_populated.result: 100% of articles have source_url with clean homepage domains (e.g. https://techcrunch.com, https://ft.com)

image_variety.result: 26 unique images in 50 articles sampled. All 10 visible articles in initial view had unique images.

deduplication.result: Unique index on article_url confirmed working. Direct ingest test: count stable at 288 before and after run. Dry-run showed only 0-3 genuinely new articles from 60 sources (not hundreds of duplicates like before).

article_url_populated.result: 100% of articles in top 100 have valid article_url starting with https://

no_duplicate_article_urls.result: 0 duplicate article_url values in top 100 articles

frontend_test_results.image_variety: PASS - 10 unique images in initial view
frontend_test_results.categories_tab: PASS - 9 categories shown with article counts
frontend_test_results.category_filter_different_articles: PASS - AI Models category shows GPT-5, DeepSeek, Grok articles
frontend_test_results.search_functionality: PASS - 15 results for 'OpenAI', relevant results returned
frontend_test_results.article_detail_read_full_article: PASS - 'Read Full Article' button navigates to article_url

content_quality_observations: ZDNet AI RSS feed contains many non-AI articles (Linux tips, router reviews, meme maker apps). These are categorized as 'Latest' because they don't match AI keywords. Consider filtering or replacing the ZDNet AI source.
Salesforce AI Blog contains e-commerce content (categorized as 'Big Tech AI'). Consider vetting RSS source relevance.
133 out of 288 articles categorized as 'Latest' (uncategorized default). This means category detection is not matching many articles to specific AI categories.
AI Models category only has 3 articles (very few). RSS feeds may not be providing enough model-specific content.
action_items: MINOR: Make source_name in article detail screen a tappable link to source_url (Linking.openURL(article.source_url)) to properly fulfill the 'source link' feature
CONTENT: Review ZDNet AI RSS feed - it appears to be a general tech feed, not AI-specific. Non-AI articles (Linux, routers, apps) are polluting the feed.
CONTENT: Salesforce AI Blog contains e-commerce guides - not relevant AI content. Consider removing or replacing with better AI sources.
CONSIDER: The admin/ingest endpoint is still synchronous. Consider wrapping in FastAPI BackgroundTasks to avoid proxy timeout (502 via public URL). This is a known issue from iteration 2.
INFO: Article total count is now 288 (expected 261) - this is expected due to ongoing ingestion adding genuinely new articles. The 261 baseline was a point-in-time snapshot.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ FIXED: Duplicate articles eliminated (514→288, deduplication working via unique index on article_url + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING)
✓ FIXED: Image variety implemented - 25-image pool using hash-based selection working correctly
✓ FIXED: source_url populated for all 261+ articles (clean homepage domains)
✓ FIXED: Fresh ingestion adds only genuinely new articles (confirmed via dry-run showing 0-3 new articles from 60 sources)
MINOR: source_name in article detail is NOT a tappable link to source_url - API field exists but not used in UI
INFO: ingestor.py _pick_image() uses UUID-based hash - articles with similar IDs may share pool images in small datasets (expected behavior with 25-image pool)
INFO: Total article count will grow naturally with each ingest run - the 261 target was a point-in-time baseline, now at 288

success_rate.backend: 92% (22/24 tests passed, 1 failed due to known proxy timeout, 1 skipped)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Articles naturally grew from 261 to 288 via ongoing ingestion.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data quality improvements all verified working: image variety (25-image pool), source_url clean domains, deduplication (unique index on article_url), fresh ingestion adds only new articles. Article count grew naturally from 261 to 288. Main outstanding items: 1) source_name in article detail not clickable as source link, 2) Non-AI content from ZDNet AI/Salesforce AI Blog polluting feed, 3) Admin ingest endpoint still times out via public proxy.
rca_of_issue: N/A - No critical bugs found. All data quality improvements verified working. The only failing test (502 on admin/ingest) is a known infrastructure issue where the synchronous ingest endpoint takes >60s and times out at the public proxy layer. The deduplication was verified via direct internal testing (count stable at 288 before/after ingest).
